properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6 v5 v6 v7 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Moon and stars Telling us of who You are You light the way and move our hearts From across the universe

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Day and night The song we bring is Your delight You listen close to every cry You hang on every word

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All across the universe We can feel Your love on earth All across the universe Your love revealed Your love is real

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Infinite No limit to the love You give Pouring out and reaching in Pleasing like the sun Like the sun

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Your love revealed Your love is real

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Moon and stars Telling us of who You are
